name: sr-api
description: Import candidates and jobs from any REST API with configurable authentication and field mapping.

name: sr-csv
description: Import jobs and candidates from local CSV files.

name: sr-eightfold
description: Fetch positions and applicants from Eightfold AI (CareerHub) with cookie, OAuth, or bearer auth.

name: sr-webhook
description: POST screening decisions to any webhook URL.
